nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yungas antwren
nodes.summary: Yungas antwren（Yungas antwren，学名 Myrmotherula grisea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于玻利維亞、秘鲁、常綠森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 28, 2023 (Myrmotherula grisea) is a bird species in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 28, 2023 (Myrmotherula grisea) is a bird species in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: 18(4): 331–348 In both countries the Jungas antwren inhabits the mid-storey and subcanopy of evergreen forest in foothills and the submontane zone

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "It is threatened by deforestation within its small geographic and elevational range, especially in La Paz and Cochabamba." "Nevertheless, vast amounts of pristine forest remain in inaccessible areas within the species's elevational range, although it may be excluded by the harsh climate in some of these areas." It is considered uncommon to common but occurs in only one major protected area
